about.title: About me
content: I'm a backend web platform developer with over 8 years of experience. I've worked primarily on digital products for large companies, where I've faced complex and scalable challenges.

My main stack includes TypeScript and Node.js, although I also have experience with Java, Spring Boot, and Spring Batch. I'm passionate about creating robust and efficient solutions that truly make a difference.
In my free time, I actively collaborate with the JavaScript Chile community (ChileJS), where I share knowledge and learn from other developers passionate about technology.
